steps.title: Count the doubling periods
steps.content:
From $1653$ to $1953$ is
$$1953-1653=300\text{ years}$$
Since the population doubled every $75$ years, the number of doubling periods is
$$\frac{300}{75}=4$$

steps.title: Work backward from the final population
steps.content:
Going backward $4$ doubling periods means dividing by $2^4$:
$$\frac{288{,}000}{2^4}=\frac{288{,}000}{16}=18{,}000$$
The answer is 18000.
